scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/web build && bun run --cwd packages/ui build && bun run --cwd packages/ui build:registry && bun run --cwd packages/testing build && bun run --cwd packages/create-gridland build && bun run --cwd packages/demo build
scripts.test: bun run --cwd packages/web test && bun run --cwd packages/ui test && bun run --cwd packages/testing test && bun run --cwd packages/create-gridland test && bun run --cwd packages/demo test
scripts.test:ci: bun run --cwd packages/web test --randomize --rerun-each 3 && bun run --cwd packages/ui test --randomize --rerun-each 3 && bun run --cwd packages/testing test --randomize --rerun-each 3
scripts.ui:build: bun run --cwd packages/ui build && bun run --cwd packages/ui build:registry
scripts.setup: git submodule update --init && bun install && bun install --cwd opentui && bun run build
